h: Giant Anteater don’t run per say, rather they gallop, much like a horse. They’re pretty quick too. The top speed of a Giant Anteater has been clocked in at 31 miles per hour (49 km per hour). To compare, Usian Bolt’s world record speed was clocked in at just under 28 miles per hour (45 km per hour). So they can move faster than you.
